<?php namespace Illuminate\Broadcasting; use Illuminate\Contracts\Broadcasting\HasBroadcastChannel; class PrivateChannel extends Channel { /** * Create a new channel instance. * * @param \Illuminate\Contracts\Broadcasting\HasBroadcastChannel|string $name */ public function __construct($name) { $name = $name instanceof HasBroadcastChannel ? $name->broadcastChannel() : $name; parent::__construct('private-'.$name); } }
